summary: Completed frontend-only testing for Effective Mathematicians marketing site. All critical flows pass: site loads, sticky header with logo + nav + Take Action CTA, Learn dropdown opens on hover with Problem Profiles and Resources links, mobile menu toggle works, hero video and CTAs visible on Home, Cause Areas page loads, Resources page filters (All/Book/Article/Website/Podcast/Course) all narrow the grid correctly and results-count updates, search filter works, About/Take Action pages load, Forum CTA links to github.com/effective-mathematicians/forum with target=_blank, bottom forum CTA visible, Contact form (prototype, no backend) submits to success state showing 'Thank you — message received.' and reset button restores the form, scroll resets to top on navigation. No console/page errors detected.
critical_code_review_comments: Contact form is intentionally prototype-only per user request — confirmed working as a client-side state transition (setSubmitted). No API wiring — this is expected and NOT a bug.
Resources filter counts appear consistent and results-count updates immediately on filter change and search input.

Header uses sticky positioning with backdrop-blur and proper z-50; Learn dropdown uses hover + click with small pt-2 gap that is bridged by the pt-2 pad — dropdown remained open on hover transitions during tests.
All pages include data-testid attributes for interactive elements as specified — testability is excellent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend was intentionally not modified (default /api/ boilerplate only). Contact form is a frontend-only prototype per explicit user request — do not treat missing API call as a bug. All data-testid selectors listed in the review request are present and working. Site is served at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Filter counts on /learn/resources: book=6, article=6, website=6, podcast=4, course=2 (total 24).
